behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: This behavior can fail inside local diff-filtering logic without requiring cross-module infrastructure. REAL-INFRA: No OS/network/subprocess is required by the behavior text. LLM-DEP: No model-output quality dependency is stated. REJECTION-GATE: Rejected Integration because the behavior text targets one transformation rule ('scoped to the lines that changed'), not a required module handoff boundary.
behaviors.test_description: Call the diff-scoping function with a patch containing changed and unchanged lines; assert the produced review input includes only changed-line context and excludes full-file unchanged content.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: BEHAVIOR-QUOTE-GATE: 'attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request' depends on real PR diff-position semantics from the hosting API/UI. REAL-INFRA: Requires real HTTP/API behavior; mock adapters can accept invalid position mappings that the real API rejects or renders differently. MOCK-HIDE: A fake comment client can hide true position-resolution failures.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions and verify via API/UI fields that each comment lands on the intended file and diff line.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: BEHAVIOR-QUOTE-GATE: 'agent identifies at least one real defect' is correctness of model judgment, not just plumbing. LLM-DEP: This depends on real model output quality; deterministic stubs would always pass and cannot reveal missed-defect behavior. MULTI-STEP: Not inherently multiple agentic decisions in sequence, so Workflow is not required. REJECTION-GATE: Rejected Workflow because the behavior does not require chained agentic stages, only defect identification outcome.
behaviors.test_description: Run analysis with the real model on a PR diff containing a seeded known bug; assert at least one returned finding correctly points to that defect class/location.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to a posted inline comment ID from the same run.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: Failure appears at module handoff between inline-post result collection and summary assembly. REAL-INFRA: No real OS/network is required if IDs are provided by in-process fakes. LLM-DEP: No dependence on model output quality. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: (a) no real infra needed, (b) no AI-output correctness, (c) no multi-agentic chain, (d) no LLM-governed handoff in this behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Wire the posting-result module to summary-builder with a fake comment API returning IDs; assert every summary entry references an ID that was created in that exact run context.

behaviors.description: No inline finding is dropped from the final summary payload before posting.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: This is a cross-module aggregation/serialization handoff issue (inline findings set -> summary payload). REAL-INFRA: No OS/network/subprocess required to catch dropping in payload construction. LLM-DEP: Not about model judgment quality. REJECTION-GATE: Rejected System because behavior text focuses on 'before posting' payload integrity, which can be validated in-process.
behaviors.test_description: Run pipeline stages from inline-finding collection through summary-payload build using multiple findings; assert payload cardinality and IDs exactly match the inline findings set (no loss).

behaviors.description: The automation sequence (read diff, post inline comments, post summary) succeeds for a real pull request when provided a fixed precomputed finding set.
behaviors.justification: BEHAVIOR-QUOTE-GATE: 'succeeds for a real pull request' explicitly requires real external API interaction. REAL-INFRA: Uses real HTTP and PR resources for read/post operations. LLM-DEP: Findings are fixed precomputed, so no model-output correctness dependency. REJECTION-GATE: Rejected Agentic because behavior explicitly removes model generation by using a fixed finding set.
behaviors.test_description: Execute end-to-end against a real test PR with a static finding fixture; verify diff read succeeds, inline comments are created, and summary comment posts successfully.

behaviors.description: The full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary) completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: BEHAVIOR-QUOTE-GATE: 'full live run with model-generated findings (read diff, analyze, post inline comments, post summary)' requires multiple sequential stages including an agentic decision stage. MULTI-STEP: At least one real model decision feeds downstream posting and summary steps, so this is a full agent pipeline. REAL-INFRA: Also uses real PR/API, but Workflow is higher due to chained agentic execution. REJECTION-GATE: Rejected Agentic-only because correctness here includes end-to-end sequencing across multiple steps, not just single model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run the complete pipeline on a real PR with live model analysis enabled; assert autonomous completion with valid findings, successful inline postings, and consistent final summary publication in one uninterrupted run.
